business_question: How did denial trends change after Q3 2024?
business_context: Revenue cycle leadership suspects stricter payer policies introduced in late 2024 caused a spike in denials and wants to measure the operational and financial impact over time.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('QUARTER', SUBMITTED_DATE) AS CLAIM_QUARTER,
    COUNT_IF(IS_DENIED = TRUE) AS DENIED_CLAIMS,
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CLAIMS,
    SUM(REVENUE_LOSS_AMOUNT) AS LEAKAGE,
    ROUND(COUNT_IF(IS_DENIED = TRUE)/COUNT(*)*100,2) AS DENIAL_RATE_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.HEALTHCARE.MART_REVENUE_LEAKAGE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
